title: Command Cockpit Mission Cartridge
summary: Added a generated game-HUD texture and tighter mobile selected-lane header so the Command Cockpit feels more premium while the playable stage starts sooner.
changes: Generated and copied a reusable cockpit mission-cartridge texture into web/assets/system for standalone repo use.
Applied the texture behind the selected-lane Command Cockpit status HUD with dark glass overlays so text remains readable.
Tightened mobile HUD rows, stat cells, bot socket, and world-map strip height to reduce pre-stage scrolling on phones.
Registered the texture in the Visual Asset Vault as a system asset so future agent-company forks can discover and reuse it.
image_prompt: Premium sci-fi mission-control HUD texture with dark glass, holographic route sockets, scan lines, and teal/amber/coral/violet accents; no text, logos, brands, characters, or watermarks.
